title: psychotria goetzei var. platyphylla
intro: Psychotria goetzei var. platyphylla, also known as African knotweed or African psychotria, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Psychotria goetzei var. platyphylla include the treatment of fever, headache, and other respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to heal wounds and prevent infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes, and in some cases, it is also used to make a tincture for external use.
